greeting: Hello Mayor! Welcome to your new land. You can test our building tools freely. Connect your wallet when you are ready!
error_road: Cannot build here, Mayor! The building must be adjacent to a road.
success_build: Great job! This building will boost our economy.
rwa_congrat_body: Your {name} is now in your portfolio! Place it on the map from your Inventory to activate a ≥2x Yield Bonus on the entire city's economy. The city is waiting for you!
rwa_place_tooltip: Click to place this building on the city map and activate the x2 Yield Bonus!
rwa_placed_confirm: Building placed! x2 Yield Bonus is now active!
start_welcome: Hello Mayor! How would you like to manage your city today?
start_web3_desc: Play with your cross-chain assets and manage real RWAs.
start_web2_desc: Play without a wallet using a Cloud save code.
start_demo_desc: Try the game without saving (data will be lost).
start_web2_new_alert:
Here is your new Mayor secret code: {code}
KEEP IT SAFE!
